meta.project: Family and Personal Document Management System

product_overview: A secure, family-centric document management backend that supports user authentication, family group management, document upload, and OCR-based processing for shared and private documents. The API enables structured organization, access control, and intelligent indexing for family and personal documents.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and user profile management with JWT-based sessions.
Enable creation and management of family groups for shared document spaces and controlled access.
Support document upload, organization by family, and OCR/text extraction for indexing and search.
Enforce role-based access and strict separation between shared family documents and private personal documents.
Design for scalability, offline sync compatibility, and reliable processing workflows.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Register and authenticate users, retrieve current user profile, and enforce token-based access for protected endpoints. Supports onboarding of Administrators, Members, and Viewers as described in system roles.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with {email, password, name} -> Receive 201 Created with userId -> POST /api/auth/login with {email, password} -> Receive 200 OK with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 OK with user profile and roles
POST /api/auth/register with existing email -> Receive 409 Conflict with error message
POST /api/auth/login with {email, wrong_password} -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message
GET /api/auth/me without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Family Management API
features.description: Create and manage family groups used to share documents and control access between family members; retrieve family details and membership information. Family-level roles (Administrator, Member, Viewer) are enforced by protected endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/families with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and payload {name, description, initialMembers} -> Receive 201 Created with familyId -> GET /api/families/:familyId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 OK with family details and member list
POST /api/families without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/families/:familyId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> but familyId does not exist -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/families with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and invalid payload (missing name) -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Document Management API
features.description: Upload documents (multi-part/file) associated with a family or personal space, persist files, trigger OCR processing for indexing, and list family documents. Documents are stored securely and access is enforced by authentication and family membership.
user_flows: POST /api/documents/upload with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and multipart/form-data {file, metadata including familyId or personalFlag} -> Receive 201 Created with documentId and processing status -> GET /api/documents/family/:familyId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 OK with list of documents including uploaded document and OCR text when processing completed
POST /api/documents/upload with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and unsupported file type -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error
POST /api/documents/upload without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/documents/family/:familyId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> but caller is not a member of the family -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User registration, login, profile management, and OTP verification.

features.name: Family Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for families, joining, and inviting members.

features.name: Document Management API
features.description: Upload, folders, and OCR processing for documents.

endpoints.description: Get all documents for a family
